analysis_plan.selection_rule: coverage tolerance pass, then interval score, with sensitivity to absolute coverage error plus width

computational_execution_policy.initial_uncapped_smoke_rows: The first three completed rows in chunk 0001 were produced before the cap was applied; no completed exact jackknife+ row was produced before the capped restart.

parallel_worker_policy.ledger_contract: Each chunk owns one execution ledger and checkpoint tree. Workers must use non-overlapping chunk-index ranges; summaries and logs are worker-specific, while chunk ledgers remain the authoritative resume state.

computational_execution_policy.policy_reason: Exact jackknife+ refits one model per training row. Rows above the cap are recorded as skipped_method with the threshold in the run notes rather than silently approximated.

mandatory_grid_invariants: Every conformal method is evaluated inside the same learner/config/split cell.
CQR is model-matched inside each learner family and is not repeated across unrelated outer model-grid rows.
CV+/jackknife preprocessing, feature selection, scaling, capping, and reducers are fit inside each fold.
All primary tasks use the same alpha grid and seed list unless a pre-run exclusion is recorded.
Regime-specific analyses are aggregated separately before any cross-regime summary.
The primary utility rule and sensitivity rules are frozen before execution starts.

fold_local_steps: categorical encoding learned from the training fold
forbidden_global_fit_steps: SelectKBest or any supervised reducer fit before CV+/jackknife fold split
target-aware transformations fit on held-out fold labels
group or temporal leakage through shuffled folds when grouped/temporal metadata are present

runner_config_requirements.runner_support: run_regression_pilot refits preprocessing inside CV+/jackknife fit folds when this flag is enabled.

purpose: Turn the Benchmark v2 design requirements into a runnable contract and record the execution controls used by the resumable runner.

selection_constraints: No source family may contribute more than two source datasets to the primary benchmark.
Deduplicated and raw variants remain task variants under the same source dataset.
External-validation datasets must be acquired or frozen after the protocol timestamp.
A dataset with ambiguous redistribution terms can be used only through public metadata and reproducible retrieval instructions.
